title: ActorIdentity
description: Identity of the actor that initiated or received the event, per actor-surface-model taxonomy.

actor.description: Actor kind from the capability matrix.

actor_id.description: Stable identifier for the specific actor instance.

delegated_by.description: Present only on delegated approval events.

delegated_by_id.description: Stable id of the delegating human — present iff delegated_by is set.
